recent_projects.name: dars-framework
recent_projects.summary: Dars is a Full-Stack multiplatform Python UI framework for building modern, interactive web and desktop apps with Python code. Seamlessly integrated with FastAPI, it allows you to build complete applications with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and reactive SPA capabilities also classic multipage html and desktop apps in a single codebase.

recent_projects.name: airbornehrs
recent_projects.summary: Production-ready adaptive meta-learning framework for continual model improvement in deployed applications.
